debug_info.goal:

hC : Convex ℝ C
x : Fin 4 → Fin 2 → ℝ
y : Set (Fin 4) → Fin 2 → ℝ
hxy : ∀ (i : Fin 4) (s : Set (Fin 4)), x i + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
